LAW AND MOTION 302, PETITIONER PATRICK MCGUIRE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS REVERSING CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD DECISION. calendar.matters:
Notice Of Motion For An Order Granting Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus Reversing California Unemployment Insurance Appeals Board Decision
Off Calendar Mar-29-2011 Text Ruling
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PATRICK MCGUIRE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS REVERSING CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD DECISION. Appearances: Shelley S. Buchanan (566.3526) for petitioner and moving party; no other appearances. Argued and the court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: denied. There is substantial evidence to support the ALJ finding and no prejudicial abuse of discretion. The court properly interpreted and applied Cal. Unemp. Ins. Code 455(e). Prevailing party to submit a proposed form of order. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi, Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998

Notice Of Motion For An Order Granting Petition For Writ Of Adminstrative Mandamus Reversing California Unemployment Insurance Appeals Board Decision
Off Calendar Mar-04-2011 Continued To Mar-29-11 At 09:30 A.M. In Dept 302
MINI MINUTES: PETITIONER PATRICK MCGUIRE'S MOTION FOR AN ORDER GRANTING PETITION FOR WRIT OF ADMINSTRATIVE MANDAMUS REVERSING CALIFORNIA UNEMPLOYMENT INSURANCE APPEALS BOARD DECISION. No appearances. The court adopted its tentative ruling as follows: continued to March 29, 2011. Petitioner to lodge a copy of the administrative record with department 302. Respondent to provide a courtesy copy of its opposition to department 302 with a cover letter reflecting the new hearing date. See San Francisco Local Rule 2.6 B. (302/LMG) Judge: Loretta M. Giorgi; Reporter: Karla Ellis-Davis, CSR #12998
